rulings.Case Title: 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC, VS. ANDREW LINTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Disqualify Plaintiff'S Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 26, 2018, Line 2. DEFENDANT WB COYLE'S Motion To Disqualify Plaintiff's Attorney. GRANTED. H. F. Ahmanson & Co. v. Salomon Brothers, Inc. (1991) 229 Cal.App.3d 1445. Fed. Home Loan Mortgage Co. v. La Conchita Ranch Co. (1998) 68 Cal.App.4th 856 is inapposite. =(501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: ISIDORA G. CERALDE ET AL VS. SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 26, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANTS SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. The Demurrer is SUSTAINED as to all causes of action brought by Estrella Reyes De Jesus because she cannot state a complete cause of action as she had no interest in the subject property at the time of the foreclosure. The Demurrer is OVERRULED as to all causes of action brought by Plaintiffs Isidora Ceralde and Alma Pecaoco. =(501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL PLOTKOWSKI ET AL VS. LISA AWBREY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 26, 2018, Line 8. DEFENDANTS LISA AWBREY, JASON ALEXANDER'S Motion For Reasonable Attorney's Fees And Costs. GRANTED in the amount of $12,100 for 22 hours at $550/hour. Defendant is the prevailing party in this action. The action cannot be voluntarily dismissed without prejudice after adverse tentative ruling had been posted. =(501/GLW)
